title: Yosys assert while making https://github.com/ZipCPU/wb2axip
extraction_note: No specific SystemVerilog construct identified as root cause. This is an internal Yosys bug where the same parameterized module ($paramod$) is processed twice by AST::process() and AST_INTERNAL::process_and_replace_module(), leading to duplicate module registration in RTLIL::Design. The trigger is the axilxbar module from wb2axip project with multiple memory declarations, but no specific SV syntax construct causes this - it's a tool-side state management bug in module processing.
